items.question: Safety-Led Operations
items.answer: Safety-led planning. Clear boundaries. Plan B when conditions change.

items.question: Private Tours (Execution Control)
items.answer: Private tours only. Your own vehicle. Your own pace (within safety limits). No mixed groups by default.

items.question: All-Inclusive Clarity
items.answer: All-inclusive by default. Clear inclusions. Fewer surprise costs. Transparent pricing, written rules.

items.question: Ijen Health-Screening Coordination
items.answer: Ijen routes include a health-screening layer (when required). Real screening, clear rules.

items.question: Proof-First Trust (Verification Layer)
items.answer: Proof you can verify — licenses, partners, press, and documented references. Trust stack, not slogans.

items.question: Reviews Registry (Independent Validation)
items.answer: Reviews as a registry, not a quote wall. Check patterns across platforms.

items.question: Our Team (Personality Economy + Operational Credibility)
items.answer: Meet the people behind your trip — with proof from reviews. Team profiles linked to real guest language.

items.question: Partners as Context (HPWKI / INDECON / ISIC)
items.answer: Partners for context: competence, sustainability, and verification. Not logos — real functions.

items.question: Press & Recognition (Third-Party Context)
items.answer: Press and recognition, explained with context. Third-party references you can evaluate.
